Question Name: What is the highest degree of reputational damage?
Question Description: This is based on if it is customer facing, if the records are PII and the number of records.

Answer: If no organization's customer data and not a Crown Jewel
If there is the organization's customer data but not a Crown Jewel
If no organization's customer data but a Crown Jewel
If there is the organization's customer data and a Crown Jewel and low (< 1000) # of privacy records
If there is the organization's customer data and a Crown Jewel and medium (1000-2500) # of privacy records
If there is the organization's customer data and a Crown Jewel and many (>2500) privacy records

Question Description: The more users the higher the likelihood.
